3246730.name: Breachers - Horror Bundle
3246730.description:
Unleash eldritch terrors with the Horror Bundle, and wrap your weaponry in otherworldly forces!

Wrap your weaponry in nightmarish creatures. You know what they say, one can never have enough eyes on your weapons! These skins feature paranormal green muzzle flashes and extra punchy, slightly eerie sounds, and lovecraftian vibes.

This bundle includes:

  • Deluxe Taurus "Horror" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Omen "Horror" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Urakan "Horror" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Marui "Horror" Weapon Skin

  • Deluxe Vezin "Horror" Weapon Skin

This bundle contains add-on content in the form of in-game items, and requires the base app Breachers. (Sold Separately)
3246730.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
